1a:"$Sreact.suspense"
0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Installation"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne v2.5.0 is a standalone Python package — no agent framework required. This page walks through every step from prerequisites to verification."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Prerequisites"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Before installing Mnemosyne, make sure you have:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Python 3.9 or higher"}]," — check with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"python --version"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"pip"}]," or ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"uv"}]," package manager available in your shell"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Quick Install"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Two commands. That's all it takes."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Step 1 — Install the package:"}]}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Using pip\npip install mnemosyne-memory[all]\n\n# Using uv (faster)\nuv pip install mnemosyne-memory[all]\n"}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Step 2 — Verify:"}]}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"python -c \"import mnemosyne; print(mnemosyne.__version__)\"\n# Should print: 2.3.0\n"}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"That's it. No database setup, no container orchestration, no config files. Mnemosyne creates its SQLite database automatically on first use."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Install Options"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"pip vs uv"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Both work. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"uv"}]," is faster, but use the matching command:"]}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Tool"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Install command"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[all]"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"uv"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"uv pip install mnemosyne-memory[all]"}]}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Extras"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne ships optional dependency groups you can install as needed:"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Extra"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Command"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"What it adds"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Core (not recommended)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Base package with FTS5 keyword search only"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Embeddings"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[all]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"+ fastembed for semantic vector search"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"LLM consolidation"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[llm]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"+ ctransformers for local LLM sleep consolidation"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Everything"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[all]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"All optional dependencies"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Optional: sqlite-vec for Performance"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}]," is an ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"optional performance boost"}]," for large datasets (100K+ memories). It moves vector similarity search into native C code inside SQLite. Without it, Mnemosyne uses an in-memory numpy fallback that works fine for most use cases."]}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"pip install sqlite-vec\n"}]}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["With ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[all]"}]," only:"]}]," Full semantic search + hybrid retrieval via in-memory numpy cosine similarity. Works great for most deployments."]}],"\n","$L3","\n","$L4","\n"]}],"\n","$L5","\n","$L6","\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16"],["$L17"],"$L18"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"zj_hjOJvNkOONB6cRNspF"}
3:["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["With ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[all]"}]," + ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}],":"]}]," Same semantic search, but vector queries run in native C inside SQLite. Faster on very large datasets."]}]
4:["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["Without ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[all]"}],":"]}]," FTS5 keyword search only, regardless of sqlite-vec."]}]
5:["$","p",null,{"children":"Install sqlite-vec only if you need maximum performance on huge datasets."}]
6:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Verify Installation"}]
7:["$","p",null,{"children":"Check the installed version directly:"}]
8:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"python -c \"import mnemosyne; print(mnemosyne.__version__)\"\n"}]}]
9:["$","p",null,{"children":"You can also run a quick smoke test:"}]
a:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\nmem.remember(\"Installation test\", importance=0.1)\nresults = mem.recall(\"test\")\nprint(f\"Stored and retrieved {len(results)} memory\")\n"}]}]
b:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"MCP Server Setup"}]
c:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne v2 includes a built-in MCP server for Claude Desktop and other MCP clients:"}]
d:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Add to your Claude Desktop config (claude_desktop_config.json):\n{\n  \"mcpServers\": {\n    \"mnemosyne\": {\n      \"command\": \"mnemosyne\",\n      \"args\": [\"mcp\"]\n    }\n  }\n}\n"}]}]
e:["$","p",null,{"children":"For SSE transport (web clients):"}]
f:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"mnemosyne mcp --transport sse --port 8080\n"}]}]
10:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Hermes Agent Integration"}]
11:["$","p",null,{"children":"If you're using Mnemosyne as a Hermes plugin:"}]
12:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-yaml","children":"# hermes.yaml\nplugins:\n  - name: mnemosyne-memory\n    source: pip\n    config:\n      data_dir: ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data\n      embedding_model: text-embedding-3-small\n      auto_context: true\n      context_injection:\n        enabled: true\n        max_memories: 5\n        min_relevance: 0.7\n"}]}]
13:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Development Install (from Source)"}]
14:["$","p",null,{"children":"If you're contributing or want to run the latest unreleased changes:"}]
15:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Clone the repo\ngit clone https://github.com/axdsan/mnemosyne.git\ncd mnemosyne\n\n# Create a virtual environment\npython -m venv .venv\nsource .venv/bin/activate\n\n# Install in editable mode with dev dependencies\npip install -e \".[dev]\"\n"}]}]
16:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"-e"}]," flag installs in \"editable\" mode — changes to the source code take effect immediately without re-installing. Perfect for development and debugging."]}]
17:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0a4uvox5u-8r1.js","async":true}]
18:["$","$L19",null,{"children":["$","$1a",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@1b"}]}]
